column1: 2004-07-25вЂЋevery so often i will update and post my latest poetry        all my poetry can be found at   urlLink  http://www.bbfree.net/shanes_poetry.com         here are some of my favourites:         Something Borrowed
column3: something blue    You sit alone and look right through    The mirror to the other side    ItГўв‚¬в„ўs time to make yourself a bride    Walk on past the staring eyes    Up to the altar you utter a sigh    The eternal burden of being a wife    ItГўв‚¬в„ўs time for you to commit your life    Into the hands of someone you knew    Something borrowed
column5: something blue    Onto the honeymoon you flew    Unwilling to enjoy and relax    Paranoid of unseen attacks    Stuck in your mind with your thoughts    ThereГўв‚¬в„ўs something wrong and itГўв‚¬в„ўs all your fault    The husband you think you love    But you can never be reassured enough    That itГўв‚¬в„ўs your ultimate choice to continue    Something borrowed
column7: something blue    ThereГўв‚¬в„ўs nothing else for you to do    Run away from you fantasy    ItГўв‚¬в„ўs not what you want it to be    Your heart no longer yearns    Fearful that he might return    To fulfil his true love vow    And take you in his arms right now    It wonГўв‚¬в„ўt happen
column8: you start over new    Something borrowed something blue      Angel Eyes         Look at me    How beautiful you are    Your angel eyes    Like a shining star    You take my hand    And walk me round    I am so high    My feet leave the ground    Then I find out    YouГўв‚¬в„ўve been cheating on me    With all the trustThat came easily    You used it as    A dagger for my heart    I watched you go    As it all fell apart    You left me where    You let me down    No longer do you    Walk me roundI canГўв‚¬в„ўt sleep    And itГўв‚¬в„ўs no surprise    As all I see    Are your angel eyes         Hollow         The hollow of your skull    The emptiness of it all    The blank expression on your face    The sullen grin you embrace    In all my time i've never seen    Asoul so pure yet so unclean    Eyes glisten with a spark    It's time for you to embark    On the journey of life that will unfurl    And take your first steps into the world    While i hold you in my arms this morn    My precious child
